Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 11 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2086 0 0}Uh-huh, that's right, {f 0 1 2}Junpei and Koromaru have rejoined the party![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 52 -1 0 0}I'd say that's mission accomplished, yeah? Nothin' to it! Just leave the explorin' to us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}But it was Aigis who found the supply route, not you.[n]{f 1 1}
